input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset mongodb-replica -o yaml

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--replSet","mongodb-replica","--bind_ip_all","--auth","--keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile"],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:01:56Z"
  generation: 1
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "5599"
  uid: a2b3ab1f-d416-4cc1-86bd-2fba8b65bcaa
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: OrderedReady
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - mongod
        - --replSet
        - mongodb-replica
        - --bind_ip_all
        - --auth
        - --keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
        image: mongo:6.0.5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: mongod
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
          name: mongodb
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/db
          name: data-volume
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-keyfile
          name: mongo-keyfile
          readOnly: true
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        runAsGroup: 0
        runAsUser: 0
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: mongo-keyfile
        secret:
          defaultMode: 256
          secretName: mongo-keyfile
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: data-volume
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending

content.text: Auth is enabled with a keyfile. Let me check the current replica set status and find credentials.

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get secrets; echo "---"; kubectl -n mongodb get secret mongo-keyfile -o yaml | head -20

input.command:
for u in root admin mongoadmin mongo-admin administrator; do
  echo "trying $u";
  kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u "$u" -p 'admin123password' --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "db.runCommand({ping:1})" 2>&1 | tail -3
  echo "---"
done

input.command:
kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- env | grep -i mongo
echo "---logs---"
kubectl -n mongodb logs mongodb-replica-0 | grep -i "user\|role\|createUser\|Successfully added" | head -30

content.text: Found it — the username is `admin-user`, not `admin`.

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u "admin-user" -p 'admin123password' --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "rs.status().members.map(m=>({id:m._id,name:m.name,state:m.stateStr}))"

content.text: Now I have working credentials and confirmed the replica set topology. Let's check the replica set's full config (votes, priorities) before adding members.

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u "admin-user" -p 'admin123password' --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "printjson(rs.conf())"
